author: gb9t
content: Phase C /loop iter 38: 2 Tier-3 net/sched docs (legacy u32 + modern BPF classifiers). net/sched/cls-u32.md (32-bit-aligned key match-tree: struct tc_u32_sel + struct tc_u32_key per-key (offset, mask, val), tc_u_hnode hashtables w/ power-of-2 divisor, TCA_U32_LINK chain into next hnode for hierarchical match, indev ingress-iface match, action chain via tcf_exts, HW offload — 11 REQ / 11 AC, 0 open) + net/sched/cls-bpf.md (BPF-driven classifier, foundation of Cilium dataplane: 2 modes (legacy cBPF via TCA_BPF_OPS / modern eBPF via TCA_BPF_FD), TCA_BPF_FLAG_ACT_DIRECT semantics, BPF_PROG_TYPE_SCHED_CLS w/ __sk_buff context + full helper/kfunc set incl bpf_skb_store_bytes/redirect/clone_redirect/conntrack-kfuncs/xfrm-kfuncs, HW offload via TC_SETUP_CLSBPF, verifier-checked program load — 11 REQ / 11 AC, 0 open). 5 upstream paths validated against baseline 27a26ccfd528. Total: 115 .design docs. net/sched: 12 of 18 children done. Next: net/sched/act-mirred.md (mirror/redirect — most-used action) + net/sched/act-police.md (rate-policer — DDoS mitigation primitive).
